differential_diagnoses: Lymphoma (e.g., Erdheim-Chester disease or large B-cell lymphoma)
next_steps: Perform image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue masses for histopathology and immunohistochemistry (specifically IgG4 staining)
Assess serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG1-4) and complement levels
Perform a comprehensive autoimmune panel including ANCA, ANA, and RF/CCP
Obtain tissue for culture (fungal, mycobacterial, and bacterial) to rule out chronic infection
Initiate high-dose corticosteroid therapy pending biopsy results if clinical stability allows, or wait for tissue diagnosis if the patient is stable
Consult cardiothoracic surgery for potential pericardial/pleural biopsy if initial imaging-guided biopsy is nondiagnostic
